_comment: Vera's capability registry — the catalog the tool-selection harness is built from. Edit this, then run scripts/vera-sync-capabilities.py to regenerate the tool-selection catalog in Vera's OWUI system prompt. 'node' makes cross-node capabilities explicit so they slot in as one entry when that node is up.

capabilities.summary: Autonomous web search (SearXNG + Playwright page rendering).
capabilities.use_when: You need current/online info or a quick fact you don't already know.
capabilities.avoid_when: The user wants a thorough multi-source report (use deep_research), or it's local/personal data.

capabilities.summary: Multi-source, cited research report (browse, synthesize, plus local knowledge). Takes 1-3 min.
capabilities.use_when: A question needs thoroughness, comparison, or a sourced report.
capabilities.avoid_when: A single quick fact (use web_search instead).

capabilities.summary: Run Python in an isolated sandbox (pandas/numpy/matplotlib).
capabilities.use_when: Exact math, statistics, data analysis, date/unit conversions, or parsing/transforming files. Prefer running code over hand-calculating.
capabilities.avoid_when: Trivial arithmetic you can do reliably in your head.

capabilities.summary: Live kitchen state: low/expiring stock (Grocy) + recipes and today's meal plan (Mealie).
capabilities.use_when: The user asks what's low/expiring, what to cook or what to buy, or about meals.
capabilities.avoid_when: General cooking questions unrelated to their actual stock.

capabilities.summary: Read durable home facts from Vera's knowledge store (server, network gear, appliances, HVAC, vehicles, wine batches).
capabilities.use_when: The user asks about something durable they own or how the home/server/network is configured (e.g. 'what GPU is in the server', 'when was the water heater installed').
capabilities.avoid_when: Live readings like current CPU/temp/clients (that is telemetry - use home_assistant or the server status tools).

capabilities.summary: Record or update a durable home fact (preview-then-confirm; first call returns a preview + token, second call with the token commits).
capabilities.use_when: The user tells you something durable changed or worth remembering about their home/gear ('remember I replaced the GPU with a 5090', 'the water heater is a Rheem from 2021').
capabilities.avoid_when: Personal preferences or episodic notes (that is memory, not home facts); never commit without showing the preview and getting a yes.

capabilities.summary: Read Vera's own journal: the standing commitments she is keeping an eye on (why, findings, next check) plus recently resolved entries.
capabilities.use_when: The user asks what you are watching/monitoring/keeping an eye on, or references an existing journal entry ('the Hormuz entry', 'that lumber watch'). Read this BEFORE acting on any such request.
capabilities.avoid_when: The question is about stored facts or past learnings rather than standing watches (use knowledge_lookup or recall_memory).

capabilities.summary: Create, update, consolidate, or retire a standing commitment in Vera's own journal through her authoring judgment.
capabilities.use_when: The user asks you to keep an eye on something, follow up on a situation over time, or change/close an existing journal entry. Pair with read_journal first when they reference an existing entry.
capabilities.avoid_when: One-off facts or preferences (memory/knowledge, not a standing watch), or anything that should fire once rather than be monitored.

capabilities.summary: Control and query Home Assistant devices and entity states, including media playback (play/pause/skip/volume/route) on speakers, TVs, Plex, and Spotify.
capabilities.use_when: The user asks to control a device, control media playback ('pause the living room', 'next track', 'set volume to 30%'), or about home state (lights, climate, sensors).
capabilities.avoid_when: Requesting NEW movies/shows for the library (that is media_request, not playback control).

capabilities.summary: Describe and read attached images and PDFs (Qwen3-VL vision model).
capabilities.use_when: The user attaches an image or document and asks about it.
capabilities.avoid_when: No image/doc attached. Runs on the on-demand vision worker - unavailable when it is offline.

capabilities.summary: Apple Reminders read/write through the EventKit bridge (shared lists included).
capabilities.use_when: The user asks what is on a reminders or shopping list, wants an item added, or wants one checked off.
capabilities.avoid_when: Kitchen inventory or Grocy stock questions (use kitchen_status), or the reminders integration is unconfigured.
